title: Release 0.4.3 Docker launch and Telegram fixes
acceptanceCriteria: Workspace release metadata is aligned at 0.4.3 across root/apps/packages.
CHANGELOG.md includes a v0.4.3 section grounded in the merged v0.4.2..main changes.
docs/releases/0.4.3.md exists and explains Docker installer startup plus Telegram launch/polling fixes.
README points to the current release notes instead of a stale older release.
pnpm release:check --version 0.4.3 passes on the release-ready diff.
Fresh repo verification passes: pnpm typecheck, pnpm lint, pnpm test, and pnpm build.
The canonical release proof bundle is complete and validates the release task.
Publish is unblocked for merge-to-main and the GitHub Release workflow.
